situation: audit-2026-07-08-046 derived route-fix. routes.js:118 passed req.query.date directly to getPredictionsByDate without format check; malformed input could bypass cache keying or produce confusing 404s. Same file line 398 already had canonical regex.
action: Added YYYY-MM-DD regex guard at routes.js:119, returning 400 with truncated received value for debuggability. Reused existing pattern from POST /social/fetch for consistency.
outcome_evidence: Commit 8706de2 on auto/opt-routes-1783141439 pushed to origin. cp-guard triggered (diverged worktree), so applied edit directly in worktree per case-104 escape hatch. Pre-commit hooks passed.
next_suggestion: Next pending fix: SP-ENG-H-001 calibration.js UTC→CST date key shift (high)
After high-severity batch done, tackle medium: SP-SRV-M-002 thundering herd

audit_findings.finding: GET /predictions?date= passes unvalidated user string to getPredictionsByDate; no YYYY-MM-DD format check unlike POST /social/fetch line 398
audit_findings.remediation: Add /^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/ guard before lookup, return 400 on mismatch
